args.cypher:
// Find all FacilityInformation submodels and their parent AAS shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

args.cypher:
// Find all FacilityInformation submodels and their parent AAS shells
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/dfki/SubmodelTemplate/FacilityInformation/1/0'})
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, sm.idShort, sm.id

// List all submodels of Hall 3 AAS
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

// Traverse HierarchicalStructures in Hall 3 to find all entities/nodes
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.smId
LIMIT 100

// Find all Entity nodes in Hall 3 HierarchicalStructures and their asset representations
MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(e:Entity)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (e)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
RETURN e.idShort, a.globalAssetId, p.idShort AS propIdShort, p.value AS propValue

// Find the AAS shells that manage the assets in Hall 3
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur3e:001', 'urn:asset:mir250:002', 'urn:asset:mir250:001', 'urn:asset:ur20:001']
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id, a.globalAssetId

// Get nameplate manufacturer and model info for the devices in Hall 3
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: $idShort})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['manufacturer', 'model', 'serialNumber']
RETURN aas.idShort, p.idShort, p.value
ORDER BY aas.idShort, p.idShort

// Get all properties from nameplate of UR3e_001
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {idShort: 'UR3e_001'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE NOT 'SubmodelElementCollection' IN labels(el) AND NOT 'SubmodelElementList' IN labels(el)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.value

// List all submodels for each device in Hall 3 to understand what they are
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE aas.idShort IN ['UR3e_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR20_001']
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort, sm.idShort, sc.id AS templateSemanticId
ORDER BY aas.idShort, sm.idShort

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)
RETURN aas.idShort, aas.id ORDER BY aas.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: 'urn:aas:hall3'})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN sm.idShort, sm.id, sc.id AS templateSemanticId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:hierarchicalstructures'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entry:Entity)
WHERE entry.idShort = 'EntryNode'
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(child:Entity)
WHERE child <> entry
MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(rel:RelationshipElement)-[:HAS_SECOND]->(ref)
RETURN entry.idShort AS entryNode, child.idShort AS childNode, asset.globalAssetId, ref
LIMIT 50

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur3e:001', 'urn:asset:mir250:002', 'urn:asset:mir250:001', 'urn:asset:ur20:001']
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(:SemanticConcept {id: 'https://admin-shell.io/idta/nameplate/3/0/Nameplate'})
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(m:MultiLanguageProperty)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
WHERE m.idShort = 'Manufacturer' AND lv.language = 'en'
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort = 'ModelNumber'
RETURN aas.idShort, a.globalAssetId, lv.text AS manufacturer, p.value AS modelNumber

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN ['urn:asset:ur3e:001', 'urn:asset:mir250:002', 'urn:asset:mir250:001', 'urn:asset:ur20:001']
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['Family', 'Manufacturer', 'Model', 'SerialNumber', 'Brand']
OPTIONAL MATCH (el:MultiLanguageProperty)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['Family', 'Manufacturer', 'Model', 'Brand'] AND lv.language = 'en'
RETURN aas.idShort AS device, a.globalAssetId AS globalAssetId, el.idShort AS field, COALESCE(lv.text, el.value) AS value
ORDER BY device, field

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: 'urn:submodel:hall3:facilityinformation'})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
WHERE el.idShort IN ['Area', 'PrimaryUse', 'PowerConnection']
OPTIONAL MATCH (el:MultiLanguageProperty)-[:HAS_VALUE]->(lv:LangString)
WHERE el.idShort = 'PrimaryUse' AND lv.language = 'en'
RETURN el.idShort AS field, COALESCE(lv.text, el.value) AS value

args.cypher:
MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel {id: $submodelId})
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..3]->(entry:Entity)
WHERE entry.idShort = 'EntryNode'
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..2]->(child:Entity)
WHERE child.idShort = 'Node'
MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
RETURN entry.idShort AS entryNode, child.idShort AS childNode, asset.globalAssetId

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $submodelId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(el:SubmodelElement)
RETURN el.idShort, labels(el) AS types, el.idShortPath

MATCH (sm:Submodel {id: $submodelId})-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(entry:Entity {idShort: 'EntryNode'})
MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(child:Entity)
WHERE child.idShort IN ['UR3e_001', 'MiR250_001', 'MiR250_002', 'UR20_001']
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (child)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN child.idShort, asset.globalAssetId, sai.name, sai.value

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell {id: $aasId})-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.id = $submodelId
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(entry:Entity)
WHERE ANY(label IN labels(entry) WHERE label = 'Entity')
OPTIONAL MATCH (entry)-[:REPRESENTS_ASSET]->(asset:Asset)
OPTIONAL MATCH (entry)-[:HAS_SPECIFIC_ASSET_ID]->(sai:SpecificAssetId)
RETURN entry.idShort AS entityIdShort, entry.smId, asset.globalAssetId, sai.value AS saiValue
ORDER BY entry.idShort

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId = $globalAssetId
OPTIONAL MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
OPTIONAL MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_SEMANTIC_ID]->(sc:SemanticConcept)
RETURN aas.idShort AS shell, sm.idShort AS submodel, sc.id AS semanticId

MATCH (aas:AssetAdministrationShell)-[:MANAGES_ASSET]->(a:Asset)
WHERE a.globalAssetId IN $globalAssetIds
MATCH (aas)-[:HAS_SUBMODEL]->(sm:Submodel)
WHERE sm.idShort = 'Nameplate'
MATCH (sm)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*]->(p:Property)
WHERE p.idShort IN ['Supplier', 'Manufacturer', 'Model', 'SerialNumber']
RETURN a.globalAssetId, aas.idShort AS aasLabel, p.idShort AS prop, p.value AS val
ORDER BY a.globalAssetId, p.idShort
